name: Mushroom and Onion Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the mushrooms and onions in butter until tender.
2. Place the cooked vegetables in the bottom of the pie shell.
3. Sprinkle the grated cheese over the vegetable mixture.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and mix together the heavy cream, milk, salt, and pepper.
5. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the pie shell.
6. Sprinkle nutmeg on top of the quiche.
7. Bake at 375°F for approximately 45 to 50 minutes.
Source: Calico Pantry Cookbook.
